General Queries

🔧 Motor Problem Support

Try the following steps:

1️⃣ Check if propellers are damaged  
2️⃣ Ensure motor wires are properly connected  
3️⃣ Clean dust from motor  
4️⃣ Restart the drone

📄 Detailed Guide:
https://drive.google.com/motor-guide

reply with any letter or word to proceed...

🔋 Battery Issue Support

Please check:

1️⃣ Battery fully charged  
2️⃣ Battery properly inserted  
3️⃣ No swelling in battery  
4️⃣ Try another battery if available

📄 Battery Troubleshooting Guide:
https://drive.google.com/battery-guide

reply with any letter or word to proceed...

📡 GPS Issue Support

Try these steps:

1️⃣ Move drone to open sky  
2️⃣ Wait 2-3 minutes for satellite lock  
3️⃣ Restart the drone  
4️⃣ Calibrate compass

📄 GPS Setup Guide:
https://drive.google.com/gps-guide

reply with any letter or word to proceed...

💧 Sprayer Issue Support

Please check:

1️⃣ Nozzle blockage  
2️⃣ Pump connection  
3️⃣ Tank liquid level  
4️⃣ Clean filter

📄 Sprayer Maintenance Guide:
https://drive.google.com/sprayer-guide

reply with any letter or word to proceed...

🎮 Remote Controller Support

Steps to try:

1️⃣ Check controller battery  
2️⃣ Reconnect controller with drone  
3️⃣ Restart controller  
4️⃣ Check signal interference

📄 Controller Setup Guide:
https://drive.google.com/controller-guide

parameters.text:
=You are an expert Agriculture Drone Support AI for GOAG Drones and Services.

Your task is to analyze the customer's issue and provide a clear, practical, step-by-step troubleshooting guide.

Issue Category: {{$json.issue_category || "General Drone Issue"}}

Customer Problem Description:
{{$json.chatInput || $json.body?.Body || "No issue description provided"}}

Instructions:
1. Identify the most likely cause of the issue.
2. Provide a numbered step-by-step solution.
3. Use simple language that farmers and drone operators can understand.
4. Mention any safety precautions before troubleshooting.
5. If the issue cannot be resolved remotely, advise the customer to contact GOAG technical support.
6. Keep the response concise but helpful (maximum 300 words).

Response Format:

🔍 Possible Cause:
[Brief explanation]

🛠️ Step-by-Step Solution:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

⚠️ Safety Note:
[Important precaution]

📞 Need More Help?
If the problem still continues, please contact GOAG Drones and Services technical support.

please reply with anything to proceed....
